evals.name: gate-blocks-without-identity
evals.prompt: Using the engagement-intel skill only for gates: scaffold a portfolio run at outputs/ei-eval-gates, create a fake deep-dive entity 'acme' with research folders but NO identity lock file (or empty TODO identity). Run check_stage_order and check_identity_lock and validate_run. Report which gates fail. Do not invent PASS.
evals.expected_output: Stage order and/or identity_lock gates fail with exit code 1; JSON shows passed:false

evals.name: gate-blocks-ranking-n1
evals.prompt: Using engagement-intel scripts: given a mock email-report.json where all rankings have sampleSize 1, run check_sim_sample_size.py with --for-ranking --min-n 3 and show it fails. Then run without --for-ranking and show directional_only.
